CustomField.description: DISABLES the RelationshipCampaignMembers.trigger (CampaignMember, after insert, after update) - checking this box will disable a trigger. This can cause erratic and unpredictable behavior in your NPSP. FOR ADVANCED CONSULTANTS AND DEVELOPERS ONLY.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: DISABLES the RelationshipCampaignMembers.trigger (CampaignMember, after insert, after update) - checking this box will disable a trigger. This can cause erratic and unpredictable behavior in your NPSP. FOR ADVANCED CONSULTANTS AND DEVELOPERS ONLY.
CustomField.label: DISABLE_RelationshipCM_trigger
